title: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Paste a white paper on a piece of plywood of a convenient size.
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Paste a white paper on a piece of plywood of a convenient size.
discussion:
This activity is helpful in understanding the concept of conditional probability,
which is further used in Bayes’ theorem.
N OTE
1.   You may repeat this activity by
taking more events such as the
probability of getting a sum 10 when
a doublet has already occurred.
2.   Conditional   probability
P (A | B) can also be found by first
taking the sample space of event B
out of the sample space of the
experiment, and then finding the
probability A from it.
